Comment: Install Certbot via Snap and Get SSL Cert

commands: sudo snap install --classic certbot 2>&1 || echo 'Snap may need to be installed'
sudo pip3 install certbot-dns-duckdns 2>&1 || echo 'pip install failed, trying pip'

sudo certbot certonly --authenticator dns-duckdns --dns-duckdns-credentials /home/ubuntu/certbot-credentials/duckdns.ini --dns-duckdns-propagation-seconds 60 --non-interactive --agree-tos --email galvezjon59@gmail.com -d budolws.duckdns.org 2>&1
